<button 
  onClick={() => window.history.back()} 
  style={{ 
    background: 'none', 
    border: 'none', 
    cursor: 'pointer', 
    color: t.text, 
    fontSize: 14,
    marginBottom: 16,
    display: 'flex',
    alignItems: 'center',
    gap: 4
  }}
>
  ← Back to Dashboard
</button>
